meaning: Doctor of Veterinary Medicine 兽医学博士
examples: Discrete Vortex Method (DVM) is a very important numerical approach in Computational Fluid Dynamics.
As a kind of data paralleling model, DVM system gets more and more concern for it's excellent characteristic.
DVM usually got an input impedance of 10 Mohm. There may be loading effect when measuring high impedance circuit.
Dr. Lester Friedlander, DVM and former Chief USDA Inspector, told Congress in 2008 that the captive bolt used to slaughter horses is ineffective.
